title: World Break: Aria of Curse for a Holy Swordsman
description:
Moroha Haimura enrolls at a special academy where students known as Saviors possess memories and powers from their past lives. Unlike ordinary students, Moroha is extremely rare because he carries the abilities of both a Shirogane, who fights using weapons and physical combat, and a Kuroma, who uses powerful magic. As he begins training alongside other talented Saviors, Moroha quickly gains attention due to his overwhelming strength and mysterious past.

While dangerous monsters called Metaphysicals threaten humanity around the world, Moroha and his classmates are forced into intense battles to protect innocent lives. At the same time, memories from previous incarnations begin resurfacing, connecting the characters through forgotten relationships, rivalries, and emotions from centuries ago. Combining action, fantasy, romance, and supernatural elements, World Break tells a story about destiny, reincarnation, and the bonds carried across multiple lifetimes.
